notes: Find recurring, solo-friendly hobbies in Bogotá that help build real mixed-gender friendships, not dating/hookup dynamics.

preferences.vibe: Edgy/adventurous but relatable. Social, attractive, outgoing young adult crowd; ideally nightlife-adjacent but structured enough for real friendships.
preferences.socialGoal: Build non-sexual friendships with attractive women and eventually a cool mixed social group.

timeCommitment.note: Prefer 1-2 sessions per week; test short/drop-in formats before long courses.

avoid: early long fixed courses before testing vibe
